Read .desc_test_input.json (a JSON array of 5 Puerto Viejo businesses needing descriptions). Write a Python script that reads this file, and for each business generates a short 1-2 sentence English description for a tourism directory called Paradisio. Be factual — mention what the business offers, its location in Puerto Viejo, and key services. No marketing fluff, no generic filler. Use the available data fields (name, category, area, subcategory, cuisine, amenities, open_status) to inform each description. Save the output as .desc_test_output.json in the same format (array of objects with business_name and description_full fields). Run the script.

codex
The input has the exact fields expected. I’m going to keep the script deterministic: category/subcategory/cuisine/amenities become concise factual clauses, with a fallback for sparse records like BERACA.
apply patch
patch: completed
C:\Users\oscar\AI WORKBENCH\Mekatelyu\generate_desc_test.py
diff --git a/generate_desc_test.py b/generate_desc_test.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..44f668401306f66baea24d4e089bb5ee4d8ea464
--- /dev/null
+++ b/generate_desc_test.py
@@ -0,0 +1,92 @@
+import json
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+INPUT_PATH = Path(".desc_test_input.json")
+OUTPUT_PATH = Path(".desc_test_output.json")
+
+
+AMENITY_TRANSLATIONS = {
+    "Accesible": "accessibility",
+    "Se permiten mascotas": "pet-friendly service",
+    "Piscina": "a pool",
+    "Piscina al aire libre": "an outdoor pool",
+    "Wi-Fi gratis": "free Wi-Fi",
+    "Estacionamiento gratuito": "free parking",
+    "Cocina": "kitchen access",
+    "Aire acondicionado": "air conditioning",
+    "Desayuno incluido": "included breakfast",
+}
+
+
+SUBCATEGORY_TRANSLATIONS = {
+    "Masajes": "massage service",
+    "Hotel": "hotel",
+    "Heladeria": "ice cream shop",
+}
+
+
+def clean(value):
+    return str(value or "").strip()
+
+
+def join_items(items):
+    if not items:
+        return ""
+    if len(items) == 1:
+        return items[0]
+    return ", ".join(items[:-1]) + f", and {items[-1]}"
+
+
+def describe_business(business):
+    name = clean(business.get("business_name"))
+    area = clean(business.get("area")) or "Puerto Viejo"
+    category = clean(business.get("category"))
+    subcategory = clean(business.get("subcategory"))
+    cuisine = clean(business.get("cuisine"))
+    open_status = clean(business.get("open_status"))
+
+    kind = SUBCATEGORY_TRANSLATIONS.get(subcategory, subcategory.lower() if subcategory else "")
+    if not kind:
+        kind = category.lower() if category else "business"
+
+    if cuisine:
+        first_sentence = f"{name} is a {kind} in {area} offering {cuisine.lower()}."
+    else:
+        first_sentence = f"{name} is a {kind} in {area}."
+
+    amenities = [
+        AMENITY_TRANSLATIONS.get(clean(amenity), clean(amenity).lower())
+        for amenity in business.get("amenities", [])
+        if clean(amenity)
+    ]
+
+    details = []
+    if amenities:
+        details.append(f"Key services and amenities include {join_items(amenities)}")
+    if open_status:
+        details.append(f"listed hours/status: {open_status}")
+
+    if details:
+        second_sentence = "; ".join(details) + "."
+        description = f"{first_sentence} {second_sentence}"
+    else:
+        description = first_sentence
+
+    return {
+        "business_name": name,
+        "description_full": description,
+    }
+
+
+def main():
+    businesses = json.loads(INPUT_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+    descriptions = [describe_business(business) for business in businesses]
+    OUTPUT_PATH.write_text(
+        json.dumps(descriptions, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n",
+        encoding="utf-8",
+    )
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    main()

diff --git a/generate_desc_test.py b/generate_desc_test.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c7ab742cb575d2a5999c3a0760d0bdb740d58585
--- /dev/null
+++ b/generate_desc_test.py
@@ -0,0 +1,103 @@
+import json
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+INPUT_PATH = Path(".desc_test_input.json")
+OUTPUT_PATH = Path(".desc_test_output.json")
+
+
+AMENITY_TRANSLATIONS = {
+    "Accesible": "accessibility",
+    "Se permiten mascotas": "pet-friendly service",
+    "Piscina": "a pool",
+    "Piscina al aire libre": "an outdoor pool",
+    "Wi-Fi gratis": "free Wi-Fi",
+    "Estacionamiento gratuito": "free parking",
+    "Cocina": "kitchen access",
+    "Aire acondicionado": "air conditioning",
+    "Desayuno incluido": "included breakfast",
+}
+
+
+SUBCATEGORY_TRANSLATIONS = {
+    "Masajes": "massage service",
+    "Hotel": "hotel",
+    "Heladeria": "ice cream shop",
+}
+
+
+def clean(value):
+    return str(value or "").strip()
+
+
+def join_items(items):
+    if not items:
+        return ""
+    if len(items) == 1:
+        return items[0]
+    if len(items) == 2:
+        return f"{items[0]} and {items[1]}"
+    return ", ".join(items[:-1]) + f", and {items[-1]}"
+
+
+def article_for(phrase):
+    return "an" if phrase[:1].lower() in {"a", "e", "i", "o", "u"} else "a"
+
+
+def normalize_status(status):
+    status = status.rstrip(".")
+    return status[:1].lower() + status[1:] if status else status
+
+
+def describe_business(business):
+    name = clean(business.get("business_name"))
+    area = clean(business.get("area")) or "Puerto Viejo"
+    category = clean(business.get("category"))
+    subcategory = clean(business.get("subcategory"))
+    cuisine = clean(business.get("cuisine"))
+    open_status = clean(business.get("open_status"))
+
+    kind = SUBCATEGORY_TRANSLATIONS.get(subcategory, subcategory.lower() if subcategory else "")
+    if not kind:
+        kind = category.lower() if category else "business"
+
+    if cuisine:
+        first_sentence = f"{name} is {article_for(kind)} {kind} in {area} offering {cuisine.lower()}."
+    else:
+        first_sentence = f"{name} is {article_for(kind)} {kind} in {area}."
+
+    amenities = [
+        AMENITY_TRANSLATIONS.get(clean(amenity), clean(amenity).lower())
+        for amenity in business.get("amenities", [])
+        if clean(amenity)
+    ]
+
+    details = []
+    if amenities:
+        details.append(f"Key services and amenities include {join_items(amenities)}")
+    if open_status:
+        details.append(f"listed hours/status: {normalize_status(open_status)}")
+
+    if details:
+        second_sentence = "; ".join(details) + "."
+        description = f"{first_sentence} {second_sentence}"
+    else:
+        description = first_sentence
+
+    return {
+        "business_name": name,
+        "description_full": description,
+    }
+
+
+def main():
+    businesses = json.loads(INPUT_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+    descriptions = [describe_business(business) for business in businesses]
+    OUTPUT_PATH.write_text(
+        json.dumps(descriptions, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n",
+        encoding="utf-8",
+    )
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    main()
